disciples.name: Sable
disciples.title: First Disciple of Spatial Philosophy
disciples.description: First Limbo soul to choose Cassian as teacher. Studies spatial philosophy — not combat drills. Mirrors the founder's path of understanding over power.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo-native soul learning spatial philosophy from a weary mentor in a surreal twilight realm, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Thorne
disciples.title: Disciple of the Guardian Path
disciples.description: Learns protection without domination — Cassian's answer to Adrian's legacy inside Limbo. Each disciple mirrors a Sanctuary founder.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple practicing guardian stance beside floating stone platforms, twilight sky, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Ember
disciples.title: Disciple of Lifefire
disciples.description: Healer-soul who learns that restoration costs the restorer. Mirrors Elena's devotion without copying her fate.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple channeling golden-green healing light with trembling hands, surreal realm, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Iron
disciples.title: Disciple of the Wall
disciples.description: Soldier-soul who learns Rowan's lesson — hold the line without becoming the line. Burden as craft, not identity.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple standing watch on a floating wall segment, ember twilight, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Horizon
disciples.title: Disciple of the Far Map
disciples.description: Explorer-soul mapping impossible Limbo geography. Mirrors Nora's restless horizon without leaving Cassian's teaching circle.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple unfurling maps of impossible islands, silver hawk silhouette distant, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Rune
disciples.title: Disciple of Pattern
disciples.description: Scholar-soul who diagrams mana as law. Mirrors Marcus — gentle obsession, ink-stained patience.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple drawing rune diagrams on floating parchment, surreal library fragments, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Refuge
disciples.title: Disciple of Integration
disciples.description: Soul who fled abandonment in life. Learns Selene's warning — love without possession. Hardest lesson in Limbo.
disciples.imagePrompt: A silver-haired Limbo disciple learning integration philosophy in candlelit surreal architecture, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Stone
disciples.title: Disciple of Foundation
disciples.description: Builder-soul who raises walls from memory. Mirrors Henry Blackstone — load before ornament.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple raising stone foundations on a floating island, twilight construction scene, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Chain
disciples.title: Disciple of Supply
disciples.description: Logistics-soul who routes impossible paths. Mirrors Alexei Volkov — precision as compassion.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple organizing supply routes across floating platforms, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Memory
disciples.title: Disciple of Echo
disciples.description: Limbo-native who remembers cycles others forgot. Carries phrases that surface on return as 'Cade's' teachings.
disciples.imagePrompt: A translucent Limbo native holding fragments of forgotten memories as glowing glass shards, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Dawn
disciples.title: Disciple of Naming
disciples.description: Soul who learns identity through chosen names — Aria's lesson passed forward. Consent as magic.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple at sunrise over impossible horizons, naming ritual with mentor silhouette, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

disciples.name: Thread
disciples.title: Disciple of the Wanderer
disciples.description: Student of the incomplete sovereign — neither combat nor conquest, only witness. Carries messages between cycles.
disciples.imagePrompt: A Limbo disciple receiving a message from a shadowy ancient witness on a precipice of broken stars, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality
